title: Vessels
description: All Devils Are Born With A Name
body:
# Vessels - Power at a Cost  
*Unleash your potential, but beware the consequences...*

Vessels is a high-risk, high-reward Minecraft mod that introduces powerful injectors, each granting extraordinary abilities—but at a steep price. Whether you need a burst of speed, overwhelming strength, or heightened reflexes, these creamed concoctions will push your limits.

## Injectors

### Adrenaline Injector  
**Effect:** *Adrenaline* – 140% movement speed increase  
**Cost:** 1 heart of damage upon use  

> "Burning through your body at lightning speed—just don't burn out."

### Overclocking Injector  
**Effect:** *Overclocked* – 90% movement speed increase, +5 attack damage, +2 armor toughness  
**Cost:** Lose 3 hearts from max health while active, 2.5 hearts of damage upon use  

> "Your body wasn't meant to handle this much power... but who cares?"

### Paranoid Injector  
**Effect:** *Paranoid* – 40% movement speed increase, 30% jump boost, +1.5 armor toughness  
**Cost:** 1 heart of damage upon use  

> "Your senses sharpen, your reflexes quicken."

## Ingredients  
To craft these dangerous injectors, you'll need **Trembling Cream**, an unstable substance that forms the core of these volatile enhancements.

**REQUIRES Geckolib TO FUNCTION**
